variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Lumina oral probiotic treatment reduce the rate of cavities by at least 50% in the 4 years after application?

variables.name: published_peer_reviewed_study
variables.description: Whether a peer-reviewed clinical trial or study on Lumina (BCSL3-S3) has been published in a reputable dental or medical journal by the resolution date.

variables.name: long_term_colonization_rate
variables.description: The percentage of users who maintain a detectable presence of the Lumina strain in their oral microbiome 12 months after a single application.

variables.name: mean_cavity_reduction_percentage
variables.description: The average percentage reduction in new cavity formation (DMFS/DMFT score increase) compared to a placebo or control group as reported in available data.

variables.name: fda_clearance_status
variables.description: Whether the Lumina treatment has received FDA clearance or equivalent regulatory approval as a therapeutic or preventative dental treatment.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will anyone other than Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner win a major in 2026 (men's tennis)?

variables.name: australian_open_2026_winner_identity
variables.description: Was the 2026 Australian Open won by a player other than Carlos Alcaraz or Jannik Sinner? (Note: Today's date is Feb 1, 2026, coinciding with the final day of the AO).

variables.name: alcaraz_sinner_combined_health_index
variables.description: The total number of 2026 Grand Slam tournaments (French, Wimbledon, US Open) that both Alcaraz and Sinner successfully enter and complete without a mid-match retirement.

variables.name: non_duo_top_five_titles
variables.description: The total number of ATP 1000 or 500 titles won by players other than Alcaraz or Sinner between February 1st and the start of the US Open 2026.

variables.name: djokovic_slam_participation_2026
variables.description: The number of Grand Slam tournaments Novak Djokovic participates in during the 2026 season (post-Australian Open).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will  an attempt be made to fire Jerome Powell before the end of his term?

variables.name: federal_funds_rate_delta
variables.description: The net change in the upper bound of the Federal Funds Rate (in basis points) between February 1, 2026, and May 1, 2026. A lack of rate cuts may increase friction between the President and the Fed Chair.

variables.name: official_white_house_firing_intent
variables.description: Whether the White House or a cabinet-level official publicly confirms an executive order or formal legal action has been initiated to remove Jerome Powell from his position before May 15, 2026.

variables.name: cpi_annual_inflation_rate
variables.description: The Year-over-Year Consumer Price Index (CPI-U) percentage change for March 2026, as reported by the BLS in April 2026. Higher inflation may provide 'for cause' arguments or increased political pressure.

variables.name: doj_legal_opinion_issued
variables.description: Whether the Department of Justice Office of Legal Counsel (OLC) issues a public or leaked formal opinion asserting the President's authority to fire the Fed Chair for policy disagreements.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the FDA have authorized a medical device that incorporates LLM-based functionality by 31 March 2026?

variables.name: fda_final_guidance_generative_ai
variables.description: Has the FDA released a final (non-draft) guidance document specifically addressing the clinical evaluation or marketing authorization of generative AI or LLMs in medical devices by January 1, 2026?

variables.name: ai_ml_enabled_devices_count
variables.description: The total number of AI/ML-enabled medical devices authorized by the FDA as listed in their official database update prior to March 2026.

variables.name: pccp_submissions_volume
variables.description: Estimated number of 510(k) or De Novo submissions that include a Predetermined Change Control Plan (PCCP) for AI-based software as a medical device (SaMD) received by the FDA in 2025.

variables.name: public_llm_medical_presubmission
variables.description: Whether at least two distinct companies have publicly confirmed (via press release or regulatory filing) that they have entered the 'Pre-Submission' phase with the FDA for a device specifically utilizing a foundation model or LLM by December 31, 2025.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: joint_military_exercises_count
variables.description: The number of joint military exercises involving at least three of the specified MENA states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) conducted between February 2025 and June 2026.

variables.name: mena_defense_minister_summit
variables.description: Whether a formal summit or meeting specifically for Defense Ministers or Chiefs of Staff from at least three of the listed MENA states (excluding the four major powers) takes place to discuss regional security architecture before June 30, 2026.

variables.name: red_sea_security_initiatives
variables.description: The number of publicly announced multilateral memoranda of understanding (MoUs) or collaborative frameworks specifically addressing maritime security in the Red Sea or Bab el-Mandeb involving Egypt, Jordan, and at least one Gulf state (excluding Saudi Arabia) by the deadline.

variables.name: gcc_plus_security_expansion
variables.description: Whether the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) officially announces the inclusion of Jordan, Egypt, or Morocco into a new, formal 'joint defense' or 'integrated air defense' framework that moves beyond existing bilateral arrangements.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Battles' in Saudi Arabia for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_annual_battle_count
variables.description: Total number of 'Battles' recorded by ACLED in Saudi Arabia during the 360 days preceding February 1, 2026. This determines the baseline for the 'ten times' threshold.

variables.name: houthi_saudi_border_clashes
variables.description: The number of distinct armed 'Battles' between Houthi forces and Saudi security forces within Saudi territory during the 30-day target period (January 9, 2026, to February 8, 2026).

variables.name: major_offensive_declaration
variables.description: Whether a major foreign or domestic armed group (e.g., Ansar Allah) officially declares a new large-scale ground offensive into Saudi territory between January 1, 2026, and February 8, 2026.

variables.name: internal_security_skirmishes
variables.description: The number of 'Battles' involving Saudi state forces and internal insurgents or armed cells (e.g., in the Eastern Province or near the southern border) during the 30-day target period.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Russia capture Kostyantynivka by March 31?

variables.name: capture_of_chasiv_yar
variables.description: Whether Russia has established full control over the town of Chasiv Yar, which is a major high-ground obstacle on the approach to Kostyantynivka.

variables.name: distance_from_frontline
variables.description: The distance in kilometers from the nearest Russian-controlled territory (as per ISW/DeepState) to the Kostyantynivka railroad station as of March 1, 2026.

variables.name: daily_russian_advance_rate
variables.description: The average daily linear advance of Russian forces towards Kostyantynivka in the Donbas sector during February and March 2026.

variables.name: major_ceasefire_agreement
variables.description: Whether a comprehensive ceasefire or cessation of hostilities covering the Donetsk region is signed and implemented before March 31, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pamandzi will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: pamandzi_avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Pamandzi on February 1, 2026.

variables.name: climatological_temp_trend_feb
variables.description: The historical average change in daily mean temperature at Pamandzi between February 1st and February 8th based on long-term climate data.

variables.name: mjo_phase_index
variables.description: The Madden-Julian Oscillation (MJO) phase index during the first week of February 2026, which significantly influences tropical Indian Ocean weather patterns.

variables.name: tropical_cyclone_presence
variables.description: Presence of a named tropical cyclone within 500km of Mayotte between February 1 and February 8, 2026, which typically causes significant temperature fluctuations.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: The daily average temperature recorded at the Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport station on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_08
variables.description: The daily average temperature recorded at the Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport station on 2026-02-08.

variables.name: historical_temp_increase_prob
variables.description: The historical frequency (from 1990 to 2025) that the daily average temperature on February 8th was higher than on February 1st at this specific station.

variables.name: major_cold_front_active
variables.description: Whether a major Arctic or Siberian cold front is forecasted to impact central France (Auvergne region) specifically during the week of February 1st to February 8th, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Chicago Board Options Exchange's Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: baseline_ovx_level
variables.description: The value of the CBOE Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index (OVX) on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: wti_price_weekly_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the front-month WTI Crude Oil futures price between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: major_geopolitical_disruption_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant geopolitical event or military escalation in a major oil-producing region (e.g., Middle East) during the week of interest.

variables.name: ovx_historical_weekly_drift
variables.description: The 52-week average weekly absolute change in the OVX index leading up to February 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the price of Brent crude oil have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: weekly_inventory_change
variables.description: The net change in U.S. commercial crude oil inventories (excluding the SPR) as reported by the EIA for the week ending closest to February 6, 2026.

variables.name: major_supply_disruption_event
variables.description: Occurrence of a significant geopolitical event or infrastructure failure resulting in a loss of >500,000 barrels per day of global production between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026.

variables.name: brent_front_month_spread
variables.description: The price difference between the first and second month Brent crude oil futures contracts on February 2, 2026 (positive indicates backwardation, negative indicates contango).

variables.name: us_dollar_index_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the ICE U.S. Dollar Index (DXY) from the market close on February 2, 2026, to the market close on February 6, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will CRL's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: crl_weekly_price_volatility
variables.description: The annualized historical volatility of CRL stock over the 30-day period leading up to February 2026, which influences the probability of price swings over a 7-day window.

variables.name: relative_sector_performance_xlv
variables.description: The percentage change of the Health Care Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLV) between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08, indicating broader biotech/pharma market sentiment.

variables.name: q4_earnings_surprise_magnitude
variables.description: The percentage difference between reported EPS and consensus estimates for CRL's Q4 2025 earnings (likely reported in early February 2026).

variables.name: earnings_call_scheduled_in_window
variables.description: Whether Charles River Laboratories schedules its Q4 2025 earnings conference call specifically between February 2nd and February 8th, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will R Praggnanandhaa have an Elo rating on 2026-02-08 that's at least 1% higher than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: praggnanandhaa_elo_feb_2026
variables.description: The official FIDE Elo rating of R Praggnanandhaa on the February 2026 rating list as reported by Wikipedia.

variables.name: elo_change_jan_to_feb_2026
variables.description: The net change in Praggnanandhaa's FIDE rating points between the January 2026 and February 2026 official lists.

variables.name: games_played_january_2026
variables.description: The number of FIDE-rated classical games played by Praggnanandhaa in the month of January 2026 (primarily at the Tata Steel Chess Tournament).

variables.name: wikipedia_fide_ranking_update_delay
variables.description: Whether the Wikipedia 'FIDE rankings' page has been updated with the February 2026 data by the resolution date of February 8, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Elon Musk be worth more than $1 Trillion by Jan 1st, 2029?

variables.name: tesla_stock_price_usd
variables.description: The closing price of Tesla (TSLA) common stock on the last trading day of 2028.

variables.name: spacex_valuation_billions
variables.description: The estimated private market valuation of SpaceX as reported by leading financial media (e.g., Bloomberg/CNBC) at its highest point before 2029.

variables.name: xai_valuation_billions
variables.description: The estimated valuation of xAI (Elon Musk's AI company) based on funding rounds or public market cap by Jan 1st, 2029.

variables.name: musk_pay_package_restored
variables.description: Whether Elon Musk's 2018 Tesla compensation package (or a substantially equivalent replacement package granting similar equity) is legally active and reflected in his net worth calculations.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Barack Obama be arrested before July 2026?

variables.name: federal_indictment_obama
variables.description: Will a federal grand jury return a sealed or unsealed indictment against Barack Obama before July 1, 2026?

variables.name: doj_special_counsel_appointment
variables.description: Has a Special Counsel been officially appointed by the Department of Justice specifically to investigate Barack Obama's role in the 2016 or 2020 elections by June 1, 2026?

variables.name: public_approval_prosecution
variables.description: The average percentage of Americans in major national polls who support the criminal prosecution of Barack Obama for 'treason' as of May 2026.

variables.name: odni_evidence_release_count
variables.description: The number of distinct documents or reports released by the ODNI or DOJ between February 2026 and June 2026 that are explicitly characterized by the administration as 'new evidence of treason' regarding the 2016/2020 elections.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will XOM's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: brent_crude_price_change
variables.description: Percentage change in the price of Brent Crude oil futures between February 1, 2026, and February 8, 2026.

variables.name: xom_q4_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The difference between Exxon Mobil's reported Q4 2025 earnings per share (typically released in late Jan/early Feb) and the consensus analyst estimate.

variables.name: s_and_p_500_weekly_return
variables.description: The weekly percentage return of the S&P 500 index from the market close on February 1, 2026, to February 8, 2026.

variables.name: major_geopolitical_supply_disruption
variables.description: Occurrence of a major military or political event between Feb 1 and Feb 8, 2026, that causes a disruption of over 1 million barrels per day in global oil supply.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Wagner Moura win the Academy Award for Best Actor at the 2026 Academy Awards?

variables.name: sag_award_best_actor_winner
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) Award for Outstanding Performance by a Male Actor in a Leading Role in 2026. SAG winners have a high correlation with Oscar winners.

variables.name: bafta_best_actor_winner
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the BAFTA Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role in 2026. The BAFTA is a key precursor award for the Academy Awards.

variables.name: gold_derby_odds_rank
variables.description: Wagner Moura's final ranking in the Gold Derby expert prediction odds for Best Actor leading up to the ceremony (1 being the favorite).

variables.name: critic_choice_best_actor_winner
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura won the Critics' Choice Movie Award for Best Actor in 2026. Winning this award often signals strong critical consensus.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the United Nations Security Council adopt a resolution related to the conflict in Sudan by 1 May 2026?

variables.name: unsc_sudan_draft_circulated
variables.description: Will a draft resolution regarding the Sudan conflict be formally circulated by a UN Security Council member to the full Council between February 15, 2026, and April 20, 2026?

variables.name: un_humanitarian_appeal_funding_pct
variables.description: The percentage of the UN humanitarian response plan for Sudan that is funded as of April 15, 2026. Low funding levels often trigger diplomatic pressure for new resolutions on humanitarian access.

variables.name: major_power_consensus_index
variables.description: The number of permanent members (P5) of the UN Security Council who publicly call for a renewed Sudan ceasefire or humanitarian resolution between February 15 and May 1, 2026.

variables.name: unitams_successor_mandate_discussion
variables.description: Will the UN Security Council hold a formal meeting specifically to discuss a new political or monitoring mission mandate to replace or follow up on UNITAMS or the Panel of Experts before May 1, 2026?

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Israel win Eurovision 2026?

variables.name: israel_participation_status
variables.description: Whether Israel is officially confirmed as a participant in the Eurovision Song Contest 2026 by the EBU and does not withdraw prior to the grand final.

variables.name: betting_odds_rank
variables.description: The average ranking of Israel in the aggregate betting odds (e.g., Eurovisionworld) one week before the grand final. A lower rank (closer to 1) indicates a higher probability of winning.

variables.name: televote_score_share
variables.description: The percentage share of the total available televote points in the grand final that the Israeli entry receives.

variables.name: jury_score_rank
variables.description: The ranking of Israel's entry based solely on the professional jury votes in the grand final.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Protests'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Protests' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360_day_avg_protests
variables.description: The average number of ACLED 'Protests' in Azerbaijan per 30-day period over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15. This sets the baseline for the threshold calculation.

variables.name: election_proximity_indicator
variables.description: Whether a national election (presidential or parliamentary) is scheduled to occur in Azerbaijan within the window of February 2026 or the three months immediately following.

variables.name: repression_index_score
variables.description: A measure of the state's crackdown on civil liberties in the 6 months leading up to the target date. Higher values indicate more restrictive environments which may either suppress protests or incite larger backlash.

variables.name: major_economic_shock_events
variables.description: The count of major economic shock events (such as a currency devaluation of >10% or sudden removal of fuel subsidies) occurring in Azerbaijan in the 90 days before February 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Alibaba have the best AI model at the end of February 2026?

variables.name: qwen_arena_score_gap
variables.description: The difference between the top-ranked Alibaba Qwen model's Arena Score and the absolute highest Arena Score on February 28, 2026. A negative value means Qwen is trailing; zero or positive means it is leading.

variables.name: us_gpu_export_restriction_severity
variables.description: A score representing the strictness of US export controls on high-end GPUs (like H100/B200) to China throughout 2025. 1 = Current restrictions, 10 = Total embargo on all AI-capable compute and cloud services.

variables.name: alibaba_top_three_status
variables.description: Whether an Alibaba-owned model (Qwen series) is ranked in the top 3 of the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (Overall) at any point during January 2026.

variables.name: competitor_frontier_releases_2025
variables.description: The total number of major 'frontier' model family releases (e.g., GPT-5, Claude 4, Gemini 2) from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google combined between February 2025 and February 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Brest Bretagne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-22 than on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: feb_15_temp_brest
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Brest Bretagne Airport on February 15, 2026.

variables.name: north_atlantic_oscillation_index
variables.description: The value of the Daily North Atlantic Oscillation (NAO) index on February 22, 2026, which strongly influences Western European winter weather patterns.

variables.name: feb_22_temp_climatology_diff
variables.description: The difference between the historical mean daily temperature for February 22 and February 15 at Brest Bretagne Airport (1991-2020 average).

variables.name: jet_stream_position_lat
variables.description: The latitude of the core of the North Atlantic jet stream at the longitude of Brest (approx 4.4W) on February 22, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the euro short-term rate (volume-weighted trimmed mean), a measure of the borrowing costs of banks in the euro area, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: ecb_deposit_facility_rate_change
variables.description: Whether the European Central Bank (ECB) announces and implements an increase in the Deposit Facility Rate between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: euro_area_excess_liquidity_change
variables.description: The change in total excess liquidity in the Eurosystem (Euro area) banking sector during the week ending 2026-02-22, which inversely correlates with the overnight rate.

variables.name: estr_historical_volatility
variables.description: The standard deviation of daily changes in the €STR over the 30-day period leading up to 2026-02-15.

variables.name: main_refinancing_operations_allotment
variables.description: The total volume of liquidity allotted by the ECB in its weekly Main Refinancing Operations (MRO) for the week covering 2026-02-22.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the market yield on US treasury securities at 3-month constant maturity, quoted on an investment basis, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change
variables.description: The net change in the Effective Federal Funds Rate (EFFR) between the 2026-02-15 reading and the 2026-02-22 reading.

variables.name: cpi_surprise_index
variables.description: The difference between the actual year-over-year CPI released in February 2026 and the consensus market expectation prior to the release.

variables.name: fomc_meeting_within_window
variables.description: Whether a scheduled Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meeting or an unscheduled policy announcement occurs between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: treasury_3mo_yield_volatility
variables.description: The annualized standard deviation of the daily changes in the 3-month Treasury yield over the 30 days preceding 2026-02-15.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will Evgeniia Chikunova still hold the world record for 200m breaststroke in long course (50 metres) swimming pools on 2026-02-22?

variables.name: major_long_course_championships
variables.description: The number of major international long course (50m) swimming championships (e.g., World Aquatics Championships, Olympic Games, or major regional championships) held between 2025-01-01 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: chikunova_ratified_status
variables.description: Whether Evgeniia Chikunova's current world record (2:17.55) remains the ratified or pending record on Wikipedia without being superseded by a faster time.

variables.name: sub_2_18_performances
variables.description: The total number of legal swimming performances by any athlete in the women's 200m breaststroke (long course) faster than 2:18.50 occurring between 2024-01-01 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: world_aquatics_russia_eligibility
variables.description: Whether Russian athletes are permitted to compete as neutral athletes or national representatives in World Aquatics sanctioned events where world records are eligible for ratification as of January 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Heartland virus disease by 2026-02-22?

variables.name: clinical_trials_active
variables.description: The number of active or completed Phase I, II, or III clinical trials for a Heartland virus vaccine as of the forecast date.

variables.name: fda_fast_track_status
variables.description: Whether any vaccine candidate for Heartland virus has received FDA Fast Track or Breakthrough Therapy designation, which would accelerate the timeline for Wikipedia to report a 'developed' vaccine.

variables.name: wikipedia_vaccine_entry_exists
variables.description: Whether the 'Vaccine' column for Heartland virus disease on the Wikipedia 'List of infectious diseases' page contains any text other than 'None', 'No', or 'Under development' as of February 2026.

variables.name: annual_reported_cases
variables.description: The estimated number of laboratory-confirmed Heartland virus cases reported globally in the year 2025, reflecting the public health urgency driving vaccine development.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will LVS's market close price on 2026-02-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: lvs_trailing_5day_volatility
variables.description: The annualized standard deviation of daily log returns for LVS for the 5 trading days preceding 2026-02-15. This measures the price turbulence leading into the target week.

variables.name: macao_gaming_revenue_growth_jan_2026
variables.description: The year-over-year percentage change in Macao's Gross Gaming Revenue (GGR) for January 2026. LVS is highly sensitive to Macao market performance.

variables.name: vix_index_value_feb_13
variables.description: The closing value of the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) on the last trading day before the start period (Friday, February 13, 2026). This reflects broader market risk sentiment.

variables.name: lvs_earnings_surprise_q4_2025
variables.description: The difference between reported Earnings Per Share (EPS) and the consensus estimate for the quarter ending December 31, 2025 (typically reported in late Jan/early Feb).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: jnim_control_regional_capitals
variables.description: The number of Malian regional capitals (excluding Bamako) under the full administrative and military control of JNIM by May 15, 2026.

variables.name: russian_force_presence
variables.description: Whether the Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner Group) maintains a documented presence of at least 500 personnel in or around Bamako to support the Malian government through May 2026.

variables.name: bamako_fuel_availability_index
variables.description: The average daily availability of commercial fuel in Bamako during May 2026, expressed as a percentage of the 2024 daily average, reflecting the effectiveness of the blockade.

variables.name: malian_government_relocation
variables.description: Whether General Assimi Goita or the primary seat of the Malian transition government officially relocates from Bamako to another city (e.g., Sikasso or Gao) due to security concerns before June 1, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will BLK's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index from the market close on 2026-03-01 to the market close on 2026-03-08. BlackRock's performance is highly correlated with broader market indices.

variables.name: blk_trailing_volatility
variables.description: The annualized 30-day realized volatility of BLK stock as of 2026-03-01. Higher volatility increases the likelihood of significant price swings over a short period.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change_expectation
variables.description: The market-implied probability of a Federal Reserve interest rate hike of at least 25 basis points occurring between 2026-03-01 and 2026-03-08. Interest rate expectations significantly impact asset managers.

variables.name: market_sentiment_index
variables.description: The value of the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) at the market close on 2026-03-01. This measures market fear and expected near-term volatility.
